title: Digital Timer Switch Price in Pakistan 2026 — Astro Timer, Time Relay & 7-Day Programmable Complete Buyer Guide
meta_description: Digital timer switch prices in Pakistan 2026. Astro timers, 7-day programmable switches, time delay relays — Rs 500 to Rs 12,000. Tubewell scheduling, street lighting & load shedding tips.
summary_html: Digital timer switch prices in Pakistan 2026 — from Rs 500 mechanical plug-in timers to Rs 12,000 GPS astro timers. Covers 7-day programmable wall-mount timers, DIN-rail panel timers, astro timers for street lighting and mosque lights, and ON-delay/OFF-delay time relays for star-delta motor starters. Includes tubewell irrigation scheduling guide optimised for WAPDA load shedding windows, complete price tables, astro timer latitude settings for 10 Pakistani cities, star-delta timing guide by motor rating, and fault diagnosis table.
